title: cyclobothra vesta
side_effects: Cyclobothra vesta can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches, which can be caused by the plant's toxic alkaloids. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to respiratory problems, muscle weakness, and even seizures. Some users may also experience skin irritation, allergic reactions, and eye problems due to the plant's potent sap. Additionally, long-term use or misuse of Cyclobothra vesta can result in kidney damage and liver dysfunction.
